_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in performing data fusion from all-source intelligence for geospatial analysis.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data literacy concepts, including reading and interpreting charts, understanding data sources, recognizing misleading visualizations, and applying basic statistical reasoning.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.401), AI-S-002 (AI, cosine: 0.370).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.296). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, fusion, geospatial, intelligence, performing, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [applying, basic, charts, concepts, interpreting, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.874, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Skill in performing data fusion from all-source intelligence for geospatial anal" and "Knowledge of data literacy concepts, including reading and interpreting charts," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.438 > STS 0.296 (gap +0.142). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.3%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [analysis, fusion, geospatial, intelligence, performing, skill]. WIDAI-only: [applying, basic, charts, concepts, interpreting, knowledge].
